text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That math quiz absolutely ruined me! Aghhh, I can't believe myself!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I need to put more spirit into my studying! But I
can't let it eat into my training time either...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Wait, what if I just shouted out math formulas
during training?! Sine! Cosine! Tangent! Like that!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No, that wouldn't help if I don't even know what
sine and cosine mean in the first place...
